---
title: "Your Comparison Title"
subtitle: "Optional subtitle"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme:
      - default
      - schemes/select-default.scss
      - apples-oranges.scss
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    css: apples-oranges.css
    center-title-slide: false
    title-slide-attributes:
      class: title-split
---

## First item {.apple}

Content for the first side of your comparison.

## Second item {.orange}

Content for the second side of your comparison.

## Shared context {.bananas}

Neutral content that does not take a side — agenda, summary, or transition.

## {.compare}

::: {.compare-grid}
::: {.compare-apple}
::: {.compare-label}
Apples
:::

Your first-column content here.
:::

::: {.compare-orange}
::: {.compare-label}
Oranges
:::

Your second-column content here.
:::
:::
